pages.title: /nyxforce <event|clear>
pages.text: Forces the next night to a specific lunar event.$(br2)Arguments:$(br)$(item)harvest$(), $(item)full$(), $(item)blood$(), $(item)star_shower$() — force that event.$(br)$(item)clear$() — cancel any forced event; let nature resume.$(br2)Requires op permission level 2.

pages.title: /nyxmeteor [x z [size [homing]]]
pages.text: Calls a meteor impact.$(br2)All arguments optional:$(br)$(item)x z$() — target coordinates (defaults to near the runner).$(br)$(item)size$() — 1–5, impact crater size.$(br)$(item)homing$() — true to track moving players; false for a fixed target.$(br2)Useful for testing crater loot drops or spawning gleaning rock in known locations.

pages.title: /locate poi soa_additions:uru_meteor
pages.text: Not a Nyx command, but worth knowing: in The End, this vanilla command finds the nearest $(item)Uru$() meteor cube — the source of Uru ore. Use in conjunction with end-exploration runs.
